title: Buffer Overflow, Underflow, and Copy Boundaries · Mastery Check
summary: A safety board presents unfamiliar buffer overflow, underflow, and copy boundaries decisions across code, diagrams, diagnostics, and stakeholder evidence; each distractor corresponds to a named misconception. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for bounded frame transformation. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Derive half-open ranges and prove start, count, end, and terminator relationships for changed empty and maximum cases.
Validate both readable source and writable destination extents before memcpy-like operations.
Choose memcpy only for proven non-overlap and memmove for overlapping byte ranges.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
